examples: Hover Camera records movements with a 13MP camera and takes 4K videos.
With the development of science and technology, a Chinese young man Wang Mengqiu, invented Hover Camera.
It is the best choice for weddings, sports games and holidays because Hover Camera is convenient for the users to carry.
Linux, the free, open source operating system, continues to hover at a little over one percent.
Thai tough guys place bets as their bodyguards hover behind holding their bosses' mobile phones.
